_comment: TODO: Develop improved data viz palettes. Standard WB brand colors do not work well for data visualization.

sequential._comment: TODO: Single-hue and multi-hue sequential palettes for continuous data / choropleths

diverging._comment: TODO: Diverging palettes for data with a meaningful midpoint (e.g. change, surplus/deficit)

categorical._comment: TODO: 6-8 color categorical palette for discrete comparisons. Must be colorblind-safe.

status._comment: TODO: Semantic colors for positive/negative/neutral indicators in chart contexts
